articles.title: Mike Vrabel reacts after TreVeyon Henderson lends support to Bulls guard cut after anti-LGBTQ+ statements
articles.description:
"I want them to be able to express what they believe in their heart and in their mind, but also want to make sure that they’re educated, and we want to be inclusive.”

The post Mike Vrabel reacts after TreVeyon Henderson lends support to Bulls guard cut after anti-LGBTQ+ statements appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Mike Vrabel emphasizes the importance of education and inclusivity in sports.
TreVeyon Henderson supports the Bulls guard's cut after anti-LGBTQ+ remarks.
Boston residents may see increased discussions on inclusivity in local sports.

articles.title: Citing First Amendment, federal judge blocks Trump order to end funding for NPR and PBS
articles.description:
The judge said the First Amendment right to free speech “does not tolerate viewpoint discrimination and retaliation of this type.”

The post Citing First Amendment, federal judge blocks Trump order to end funding for NPR and PBS appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Federal judge blocks Trump's order to cut NPR and PBS funding, citing First Amendment rights.
Judge emphasized that viewpoint discrimination is unconstitutional, protecting public broadcasting.
Boston residents will continue to access NPR and PBS programming without funding interruptions.

articles.title: US journalist kidnapped in Baghdad and security forces hunt captors, Iraqi officials say
articles.description:
The journalist was identified as freelancer Shelly Kittleson by one of the outlets she worked for.

The post US journalist kidnapped in Baghdad and security forces hunt captors, Iraqi officials say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: US journalist Shelly Kittleson was kidnapped in Baghdad, raising concerns for local journalists.
Security forces are actively searching for her captors, with Iraqi officials involved.
Boston residents may feel increased anxiety about journalist safety abroad.

articles.title: This Concord mom is making her dream come true by running Boston
articles.description:
"I finally have the time, perspective, and health to work toward a goal I’ve carried in my heart for decades."

The post This Concord mom is making her dream come true by running Boston appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Concord resident Kelly Turner is training to run the Boston Marathon.
Turner aims to fulfill a lifelong dream after decades of waiting.
Her journey inspires local runners and highlights community support for marathon participants.

articles.title: She’s running Boston in memory of her best friend
articles.description:
After losing her best friend to a ruptured brain aneurysm, she's running Boston to support The Brain Aneurysm Foundation.

The post She’s running Boston in memory of her best friend appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Brette Miller is running the Boston Marathon to honor her late best friend.
She aims to raise awareness for The Brain Aneurysm Foundation during the April 2026 event.
Her efforts will support local initiatives for brain aneurysm research and education.

articles.title: Army suspends 2 helicopter crews that flew near Kid Rock’s Nashville home
articles.description:
The crews of two AH-64 Apache helicopters that hovered next to Kid Rock’s swimming pool while he clapped and saluted on Saturday have been suspended from flying pending an Army investigation of their actions.

The post Army suspends 2 helicopter crews that flew near Kid Rock’s Nashville home appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Army suspends two AH-64 Apache helicopter crews for flying near Kid Rock's home.
Incident occurred on Saturday; crews are under investigation for their actions.
Suspension may affect local military operations and community relations in Boston.
